/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libnurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libnurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/nurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nurse_interfaces/msg/detail/object_token__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nurse_interfaces/msg/detail/object_token_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nurse_interfaces/msg/detail/emergency_signal__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nurse_interfaces/msg/detail/tool_prompt__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/nurse_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/nurse_interfaces/msg/detail/safety_signal__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
